brief_summary: Two stacked windows showing the R2 timeline shift. Top: faded dashed bar for the originally-announced window 2026-05-01 to 2026-06-15 (struck through). Bottom: bronze-filled solid bar for the revised window 2026-06-01 to 2026-07-15. Caption: 'CannonKeys shifted the R2 window — one month later · the closing date is soft'.
data_sources: mode-sonnet-r2-group-buy-coverage.mdx § Update Callout — 'The buy is now announced for 2026-06-01 through 2026-07-15 rather than the originally-published 2026-05-01 through 2026-06-15 dates referenced below.'
mode-sonnet-r2-group-buy-coverage.mdx § 'Buying notes' — 'The safest read of 2026-06-15 is do not assume an extension.'
